modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty customizing a chart in Google Sheets.

full_description_text: User is trying to modify a chart in Google Sheets. They are unsure how to proceed with the customization. The user has limited technical knowledge and needs assistance with this task.
short_description: Difficulty customizing a chart in Google Sheets.
description: User is trying to modify a chart in Google Sheets. They are unsure how to proceed with the customization. The user has limited technical knowledge and needs assistance with this task.
